## ❌ NEVER PROPOSE (hard rejections)

These proposal types are permanently rejected. Proposing them again wastes a swarm slot.

- Microservices architecture — monolith works fine (Session 23)
- ORM for database interactions — Supabase SDK is sufficient (Session 23)
- Redis for rate limiting — in-memory slowapi is sufficient for now (Session 23)
